brief.situation: 30-second AIA Health Shield Gold Max brand film — walk viewers end-to-end through the plan: what MediShield Life alone leaves exposed, how Gold Max covers private hospitals, Max VitalHealth eliminating co-insurance, the S$2 million annual limit, 13 months pre/post coverage, 380+ AQHP specialists, and the guaranteed lifetime coverage — ending on the AIA promise Healthier, Longer, Better Lives.

block_props.headline: Complete your cover.
block_props.subtitle: Enjoy coverage for private hospitals and wards, so you can focus on recovery.

block_props.name: Go cashless with Max VitalHealth.
block_props.role: Add the rider to cover your deductible and co-insurance for zero out-of-pocket expenses.

block_props.headline: Protection for a lifetime.
block_props.subtitle: Enjoy guaranteed lifetime coverage, so you're always protected.
